constraints.reason: Official reuse guidance says the sitemap covers the majority, not all, of GOV.UK pages.
constraints.disposition: Union with Search, Organisations, structured Content API traversal and bounded gap detectors.

constraints.reason: The final sitemap shard changed during the preflight while the index watermark remained older.
constraints.disposition: Hash and refetch every shard; reject a mixed T0 or T1 set.

constraints.reason: The public Search API is unsupported, English/format-limited and has no unique immutable cursor.
constraints.disposition: Opposing timestamp passes, page overlap, deduplication, T1 repeat and independent enumerators.

constraints.reason: Path lookup covers known www.gov.uk HTML-backed content and omits documented dynamic, asset and historic classes.
constraints.disposition: Use only as a hydrator and structured graph expander.

constraints.reason: Bulk authoritative and current search/graph surfaces are not publicly reproducible.
constraints.disposition: Comparator-only; no authenticated source permission was granted.

constraints.reason: OGL does not automatically cover third-party rights, logos, personal data or every attachment.
constraints.disposition: Metadata-and-link default plus per-item rights evidence and exception triggers.

constraints.reason: Current Python/OpenSSL rejected the source server's legacy TLS parameters with DH_KEY_TOO_SMALL.
constraints.disposition: TLS and access controls were not weakened. ResearchGate and its exact author PDF returned HTTP 403. The strict-TLS Crossref DOI record now supports bibliographic identity only; no section-level full-text claim is released.

constraints.reason: No public complete inventory of historic redirects, gone routes and unpublishings was found.
constraints.disposition: Represent every instance found by admitted sources and publish the residual public-enumerability limit.

constraints.reason: The public GOV.UK Chat service is delivered through the signed-in GOV.UK app, while its production web interface is a departmental testing surface protected by GOV.UK Signon.
constraints.disposition: Do not automate, bypass or make either authenticated surface a release dependency. Limit the checked-in comparator to public official descriptions, minimal source metadata, one bounded attributed excerpt, a structured paraphrase and an official image URL plus digest; keep live replay and expanded reuse blocked pending authorised access and item-level rights review.
